title: Pear Transparent Green Soap Bar 125g – 6xPack- Pure & Gentle Glycerin-Based Soap with Natural Oils- Iconic Herbal Fragrance- Mild & Moisturising Cleanser for Face and Body- Ideal for Sensitive Skin
features: 🔹GENTLE ON SENSITIVE SKIN: Formulated with natural oils and high-quality glycerin, Pears Transparent Soap is designed to cleanse without stripping your skin’s natural moisture. It’s perfect for everyday use on sensitive, dry, or delicate skin, making it a great choice for the whole family.

🫧ORIGINAL TRANSPARENT FORMULA: This iconic green soap bar is known for its transparent appearance and mild formula. It gently lifts away dirt, oil, and impurities while maintaining your skin’s natural pH balance. A timeless skincare staple used by millions across the UK.

🌿A REFRESHING CLEANSE: Enjoy a gentle, refreshing wash with every use. Pears soap is enriched with natural oils and a mild, clean fragrance that leaves your skin feeling smooth, soft, and lightly scented — perfect for face and body.

📦 GREAT VALUE BULK PACK: Why settle for one when you can stock up and save? This pack includes 6 full-size bars (125g each), ideal for family bathrooms, guest supplies, or long-term personal use. Keep your skin care essentials well-stocked all year round.

✅ DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED: Clinically tested to be safe and effective, Pears Transparent Soap is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. Its gentle ingredients make it a reliable choice for adults, teens, and even older children.
description: Product description WHY CHOOSE PEARS TRANSPARENT SOAP? Trusted heritage brand with over 200 years of skincare expertise Enriched with glycerin and natural oils for gentle hydration Suitable for sensitive, dry, and combination skin Ideal for face and body cleansing Dermatologically tested for daily use by the whole family Economical 6-pack – great for bulk buyers or households 💦 Versatile for Your Entire Routine More than just a hand soap, this multi-purpose bar works beautifully for: Daily face and body cleansing Pre-shave preparation Makeup brush cleaning Delicate hand laundry Travel and gym essentials THE PEAR'S DIFFERENCE: Enriched with natural glycerin Transparent, gentle formula Suitable for all skin types Vegan and cruelty-free Biodegradable formulation Long-lasting bars How to Use: Wet the bar and work into a rich lather between your hands. Apply to face or body using gentle circular motions, then rinse thoroughly. For best results, store on a draining soap dish between uses. Safety Warning External Use Only
